summary: Create database array to store a list of cars that all share the same keys
description: Keyword 'database' is not listed in the database domain's 'Match when' column in cook/SKILL.md (triggers are: sql, schema, migration, postgres, prisma, redis, cache). Despite the explicit 'database' signal, the domain is not matched, so database-specific standards are never loaded for this task.

fix_proposal.add_database_trigger: Add 'database' to trigger keywords in database domain row in cook/SKILL.md Step 6 table
fix_proposal.template_design: Create standards/code-changes-template.md. Cook fills it (task summary + matched standards + protocol) and outputs it as the standalone prompt for any coding subagent. Subagent doesn't know about cook — just follows the template's plain-text Output section which defines a JSON blob format.
fix_proposal.eval_status: Mark complete when both changes are shipped
